rationale: Gov't Code §2001.121 governs admissibility of child abuse victim testimony in contested administrative cases. It bears no relation to Tax Code §11.13(b) homestead exemption amounts. No conflict exists.
quote: Sec. 2001.121. STATEMENT OR TESTIMONY BY CERTAIN CHILD ABUSE VICTIMS.
_note: Rule text is entirely unrelated to the proposed homestead exemption increase; no overlap in subject matter.
